progress.streakSubtitle: Write one entry a day to keep your streak alive. Melo grows with it.
progress.soundRewards: Streaks unlock sound rewards: new instruments, genres and Melo outfits — never pressure, always gifts.
progress.meloLevel1: Melo · level 2 — got headphones at day 7
progress.meloLevel2: Melo · level 3 — learned to whistle at day 14
progress.meloLevel3: Melo · level 4 — started a band at day 30
progress.meloNext0: At 7 days he gets headphones. At 14, he learns to whistle.
progress.meloNext1: At 14 days he learns to whistle. At 30, he starts a band.
progress.meloNext2: At 30 days he starts a band. Keep the rhythm going!
progress.meloNext3: You're keeping the band alive. Melo is proud of you.

inspirationTitles: The day we said I do...
First morning in a new country...
Feeling you move for the first time...
Nine months of becoming a parent...
The day I quit my job to build this...
Our first customer walked through the door...
The last day of senior year...
What I finally said out loud...
A breakthrough I never saw coming...
Starting over, on my own terms...

newEntry.heading: How was your day?
newEntry.subheading: Capture your feelings and let Melody AI turn it into your daily soundtrack.
newEntry.textareaPlaceholder: Today felt like a slow rainy afternoon with a hopeful ending...

validation.entryMin: Write at least a few lines about your day.
